calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Mary Ghai (administrator)

Ms. Hall addressed the outstanding question regarding the notice of proposed action, that Ms. Ghai misunderstood what she should do, that the $6,000.00 was placed into a custodial account for the kids.

The Court questioned why this money shouldn't be placed into a blocked account. Ms. Hall argued that there is no difference between a custodial account and a blocked account in her view, that the $6,000 is the only money in the estate, that they money is a family allowance and if the funds were in a blocked account then Mary would have to petition the Court to use the money.

The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To May-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Continued To Mar-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2016 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall (via court call) for (personal representative) Mary Ghai.

The Court stated that on December 21, 2015 we were told that the petition was ready to be filed that it just needed a signature. Ms. Hall stated that they received additional information and found that there was a discrepancy that they needed to correct, that they are trying to obtain original bank statements and that they can have the petition filed within 30 days. The probate accounting status report was continued to February 23, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court voiced its concern about previously being told that this was ready to go when it was not.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Jan-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for petitioner Mary Ghai

Ms. Hall stated that the petition to approve accounting was prepared and had been sent to the petitioner for signature. She requested a 30-day continuance to complete the filing. The matter was continued to January 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Continued To Dec-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 9:45 a.m. and there is no appearance by counsel. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator Mary Ghai and the Attorney Mercy Hall to appear on December 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Mary Ghai (Administration).

Ms. Hall stated that she will look into the issue of the verification that was signed by Ms. Ghai that did not have a date and that she prepared a report of status of administration. Ms. Hall also provided history, addressed the request for family allowance and stated that she would like to keep the estate open for one year for the issue of the law suit. Status on closing of the estate was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Apr-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Lily Moallem for Mary Ghai (Administrator).

The Court noted that the criminal action is not concluded. Ms. Moallem confirmed that they are still waiting for the outcome of the criminal action that she has filed a Status Report. The Court advised counsel that she needs to file a Petition to Approval the Status Report. The status was continued to April 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of the Status Report.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Jan-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mercy Hall for Administrator.

Ms. Hall stated that the civil wrongful death action was put on hold because the County decided to pursue a criminal action. Status on closing the estate was continued to January 6 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
